---
title: "Voting patterns in the 2019 general election"
date: 2020-01-15
description: "RGS geovisualisation explainer on UK 2019 General Election voting patterns."
title-block-banner: "#32251f"

categories:
  - political geography
  - data visualization
  - elections

image: con_lab_swing.png
twitter-card: 
    image: "con_lab_swing.png"
open-graph: 
    image: "con_lab_swing.png"

format:
  html:
    shift-heading-level-by: 1
---

```{=html}
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://www.rgs.org/about-us/what-is-geography/geovisualisation/voting-patterns-in-the-2019-general-election">
<script>
  window.location.replace("https://www.rgs.org/about-us/what-is-geography/geovisualisation/voting-patterns-in-the-2019-general-election");
</script>
<p>Redirecting to the RGS page. If you are not redirected, <a href="https://www.rgs.org/about-us/what-is-geography/geovisualisation/voting-patterns-in-the-2019-general-election">click here</a>.</p>
```
